hero.eyebrow: AI Product Manager · Digital Curator · Workflow Architect
hero.title: Weave knowledge with AI into a Goldenwave.
hero.sub: This is not a resume page crowded with everything. It is my personal operating-system entry point: selected works, business Agent practice, knowledge assets, and reusable workflows.

panel.label: Goldenwave Shader
panel.title: Fluid light across a dark, sophisticated surface.
panel.desc: Motion feels organic and liquid; the interface stays crisp, quiet, and editorial.

quote.label: Epigraph
quote.text: A good AI product does not replace people; it amplifies human judgment, experience, and taste through systems.

works.label: Selected Works · 2017—2026
works.title: Selected Works.
works.desc: A quieter archive structure: each work shows one judgment, one role, and one direction.
items: An Agent system for WeCom, outbound calls, business rules, and human collaboration.
An interface for business users to configure, test, version, and manage Agent tools.
A compounding knowledge system built from notes, GitHub Stars, wiki entities, and scheduled sync.
Reusable AI workflows packaged as agent skills.

systems.label: Workflow Systems
systems.title: Workflow Assets.
systems.desc: My differentiator is not a tool list, but the ability to turn real problems into reusable systems.
items: User touchpoints, Agent replies, human handoff, and QA feedback in one operating loop.
From saved links, notes, and project material to structured wiki entities.
PRDs, technical designs, issue creation, multi-agent collaboration, and retrospectives.

knowledge.label: Knowledge & Signals
knowledge.title: Knowledge & Taste.
knowledge.desc: A calm resource area split into two shelves: Knowledge Map and Wave Picks.

contact.label: Collaboration
contact.title: Have an AI workflow idea? Let’s talk.
